questions.objective_ref: Define cosine similarity and explain how it differs from the raw dot product.
Explain why cosine similarity ignores vector magnitude and why that matters for word vectors.
Walk through the cosine similarity formula step by step — dot product, magnitudes, division.
Interpret a cosine similarity score (near 1, near 0, near −1).
Identify where cosine similarity is used in embedding-based systems.
Define cosine similarity and explain how it differs from the raw dot product (applied — magnitude sensitivity misconception).
